top3.sql:
SELECT e."Examination Date"
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.ALB BETWEEN 3.5 AND 5.0  -- Assuming normal albumin range is 3.5-5.0 g/dL
ORDER BY l.ALB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e."Examination Date"
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.ALB BETWEEN 3.5 AND 5.0  -- Assuming normal albumin range is 3.5-5.0 g/dL
ORDER BY l.ALB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e."Examination Date"
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.ALB >= 3.5 AND l.ALB <= 5.0
ORDER BY l.ALB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e."Examination Date"
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Examination e ON l.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.ALB >= 3.5 AND l.ALB <= 5.0
ORDER BY l.ALB DESC
LIMIT 1;
